home.blogViewAllSubtitle: Discover all our adventures and unique experiences
home.explorationComingSoon: Coming soon! You'll be able to explore this section.
home.explorationSubtitle: Find the perfect starting point for your next trip.
home.heroPrimaryCtaAriaLabel: Go to 'Start your trip' with the 'By traveller' tab selected
home.heroSubtitle:
Live the unexpected without improvising. We design your trip
and reveal the destination 48 hours before.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Your next unforgettable memory is just one click away. Don't think twice.
home.howItWorksNote: * The destination is revealed 48 hours before to preserve the surprise. Guide and checklist are sent.

howItWorksSteps.title: PLAN
howItWorksSteps.description: Choose dates, origin city, duration and budget. Add filters and mood if you like.

howItWorksSteps.title: GET THE SURPRISE
howItWorksSteps.description: Confirm your trip. We reveal the destination 48 hours before and send you the guide for that mood.

howItWorksSteps.title: TRAVEL STRESS-FREE
howItWorksSteps.description: Pack your bags. Flights and accommodation ready; human support when you need it.

home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. Zero stress. More discovery.

benefitsSteps.title: stress-free and flexible
benefitsSteps.description: You say how much you want to spend and when; with options and filters to tailor the surprise to you. We take care of the rest.

benefitsSteps.title: All taken care of
benefitsSteps.description: Flights and accommodation aligned to your budget and travel style.

benefitsSteps.title: authentic discovery
benefitsSteps.description: Experience the thrill of the unexpected with real curation, not random.

experiencias.heroCtaAriaLabel: Go to plans by traveler type section
experiencias.heroSubtitle: Choose the budget/plan per person for travel and accommodation. We'll take care of the rest.
experiencias.travelTypeSubtitle: Choose who you're traveling with for this experience.

inspirationBanner.title: Stories from solo travelers that inspire

hero.title: Start the adventure
hero.description: Who will you write your next story with?
hero.subtitle: STARTING POINT

substeps.title: TRAVEL TYPE
substeps.description: From solo getaways to group, family, pet-friendly trips or honeymoon.

substeps.title: EXPERIENCE
substeps.description: The only thing you define here is the per-person budget for travel and accommodation. That's your ceiling. We take care of the rest.

substeps.title: WHAT'S THE REASON FOR MY TRIP
substeps.description: We travel for many reasons—what's driving you today?

substeps.title: ORIGIN
substeps.description: Choose country and city of departure.

substeps.title: DATES
substeps.description: Choose number of days and start date. Weekend or flexible.

substeps.title: TRANSPORT
substeps.description: Set your preferred order of transport options by dragging.

substeps.title: FILTERS
substeps.description: Preferred times, weather, destinations to avoid, max travel time, transport type.

mainContent.completeBudgetFirst: First complete travel type and experience in the Budget section.
mainContent.completeOriginFirst: First complete Origin and Dates in Details and planning.
mainContent.customTripNoExcuseMessage: Your trip is custom-designed with your advisor. Continue to the next steps to enter origin, dates and preferences.
mainContent.experiencePlaceholder: What I want from my trip
mainContent.experienceStepDescription: Select the experience level that best fits your budget and preferences.
mainContent.refineDetailsStepDescription: When the unknown becomes your best companion.

detailsStep.datesPlaceholder: Choose number of days and start date

datesPicker.availableFromHint: Dates available from 7 days from now.

detailsStep.originPlaceholder: Choose country and city of departure
detailsStep.transportPlaceholder: Set order of preference by dragging

transportSelector.hintOrder: It's not a single option: rank 1 to 4 by preference. Depending on the destination we may use another option from the list.
transportSelector.hintTransfers: Train and Ship may require extra transfers.

preferencesStep.filtersSummaryDefault: Transport, schedules, climate, destinations to avoid
preferencesStep.addonsHint: Optional. Add insurance, seats or baggage according to your level.
preferencesStep.addonsEmptyMessage: Complete travel type and experience to see available add-ons.

cancel-ins.title: Cancellation Insurance
cancel-ins.longDescription: Covers cancellations for covered reasons. Calculated as 15% of subtotal.

car-rental.title: Car rental (per day)
car-rental.longDescription: Price per day. Adjust number of days.

excuses.title: Solo Adventure
excuses.description: Discover the world at your own pace, with no commitments or schedules.

excuses.title: Cultural Immersion
excuses.description: Dive into traditions, flavors, and local customs.

excuses.title: Wellness Retreat
excuses.description: Reconnect with yourself in a peaceful, tranquil setting.

excuses.title: Romantic Getaway
excuses.description: A short trip—enough to tune out the world and tune into each other.

excuses.title: Adventure as a Couple
excuses.description: Discover places together that challenge and bring you closer.

excuses.title: Romantic Getaway
excuses.description: A short trip—enough to tune out the world and tune into each other.

excuses.title: Adventure Duo
excuses.description: Nothing brings you closer than getting lost in nature and conquering the unexpected together.

excuses.title: Foodie Lovers
excuses.description: For those who believe love also enters through the palate.

excuses.title: Culture & Tradition
excuses.description: The charm of discovering towns, stories, and local customs together.

excuses.title: Celebrations
excuses.description: An anniversary, a milestone, or simply the perfect excuse to toast together.

excuses.title: Beach & Dunes
excuses.description: Sun, sand, and the eternal excuse to walk hand in hand at sunset.

excuses.title: Urban Getaway
excuses.description: Because the city can also be the best setting to get lost as a couple.

excuses.title: Family Adventure
excuses.description: Create unforgettable memories for the whole family.

excuses.title: Group Adventure
excuses.description: Share unique experiences with your closest friends.

excuses.title: Luxury Honeymoon
excuses.description: The perfect start to your life together with unique experiences.

excuses.title: Adventure with Pets
excuses.description: Include your furry best friend in the adventure.

solo-adventure.label: Hiking & Trekking
solo-adventure.desc: Walk to places that can only be reached on foot.

solo-adventure.label: Water Sports
solo-adventure.desc: Dive into adventures that keep you afloat.

solo-adventure.label: Extreme Sports
solo-adventure.desc: Pure adrenaline that makes you feel alive.

cultural-immersion.label: Local Traditions
cultural-immersion.desc: Take part in authentic ceremonies and festivities.

cultural-immersion.label: Culinary Tours
cultural-immersion.desc: Taste local cuisine with chefs and families.

cultural-immersion.label: Art & Galleries
cultural-immersion.desc: Explore local art and cultural expressions.

wellness-retreat.label: Spa Treatments
wellness-retreat.desc: Relaxation and rejuvenation in a luxurious setting.

wellness-retreat.label: Meditation & Yoga
wellness-retreat.desc: Find your center through mindful practice.

wellness-retreat.label: Nature Immersion
wellness-retreat.desc: Connect with the natural world to find inner peace.

escapada-romantica.label: Local Culture & Leisurely Walks
escapada-romantica.desc: Walk hand in hand through places that tell stories you don't know yet.

escapada-romantica.label: Gastronomy & Wine Experiences
escapada-romantica.desc: Love is also tasted at the table: flavors, glasses, and laughter for two.

escapada-romantica.label: Sunsets & Intimate Moments
escapada-romantica.desc: The simple that becomes eternal: gazing at each other in silence before a shared horizon.

duo-aventura.label: Trekking & Nature
duo-aventura.desc: Climb together, discover together, conquer together.

duo-aventura.label: Water Adventure
duo-aventura.desc: Rivers, lakes, or seas: let the current and shared adrenaline carry you.

duo-aventura.label: Wildlife Exploration
duo-aventura.desc: The thrill of observing wildlife as privileged witnesses.

duo-aventura.label: Desert & Dunes
duo-aventura.desc: The golden vastness where every step is an act of complicity.

foodie-lovers.label: Cooking Workshops & Experiences
foodie-lovers.desc: Cook together: a fun chaos that turns into complicity.

foodie-lovers.label: Street Food & Markets
foodie-lovers.desc: Discover the soul of a place in a single street bite.

foodie-lovers.label: Fine Dining & Gourmet Experiences
foodie-lovers.desc: A table where every dish becomes part of the celebration.

foodie-lovers.label: Wine Routes & Wineries
foodie-lovers.desc: Toast in landscapes that taste of history and terroir.

cultura-tradicion.label: Museums & Heritage
cultura-tradicion.desc: Art and history as an excuse to walk more slowly.

cultura-tradicion.label: Towns & Walks
cultura-tradicion.desc: Small streets, big stories: the charm of the everyday.

cultura-tradicion.label: Crafts & Local Design
cultura-tradicion.desc: Objects that tell handcrafted stories, to take with you.

cultura-tradicion.label: Local Festivals
cultura-tradicion.desc: The magic of sharing customs lived with collective joy.

wellness-retreat.label: Spa & Hot Springs
wellness-retreat.desc: Water, calm, and the luxury of having nothing else to do.

wellness-retreat.label: Yoga & Mindfulness
wellness-retreat.desc: Breathe in unison and reconnect with your shared essence.

wellness-retreat.label: Silent Nature
wellness-retreat.desc: The power of listening to the forest in silence, together.

wellness-retreat.label: Detox. Retox. Repeat
wellness-retreat.desc: Self-care as a shared ritual: what goes in nourishes body and bond.

celebraciones.label: Anniversary Getaway
celebraciones.desc: A trip that celebrates time together, with new memories to add.

celebraciones.label: Milestones & Achievements
celebraciones.desc: Because life's big steps deserve more than a toast—they deserve a trip.

celebraciones.label: City Lights
celebraciones.desc: Rooftops, neon, and the vibe of a night remembered forever.

celebraciones.label: Evenings with Music
celebraciones.desc: A live soundtrack to add rhythm to the celebration and complicity.

playa-dunas.label: Relax & Sand
playa-dunas.desc: The sea as a backdrop and time suspended between waves.

playa-dunas.label: Water Sports
playa-dunas.desc: Share the thrill of movement and salt water on your skin.

playa-dunas.label: Scenic Walks
playa-dunas.desc: Walk along the shore where every step comes with breeze and light.

playa-dunas.label: Nightlife & Music
playa-dunas.desc: The sound of the sea mixed with music and lights: a party without clocks.

escapada-urbana.label: Art & Architecture
escapada-urbana.desc: Discover how the city breathes through its shapes and colors.

escapada-urbana.label: Gastronomy & Cocktails
escapada-urbana.desc: Hidden bars and vibrant tables: the pulse of the city in every glass.

escapada-urbana.label: Culture & Shows
escapada-urbana.desc: Go out and get lost in the city that never sleeps.

escapada-urbana.label: Shopping & Design
escapada-urbana.desc: Hunt for modern treasures at every creative corner.

family-adventure.label: Nature Exploration
family-adventure.desc: Discover nature together as a family.

group-adventure.label: Nightlife
group-adventure.desc: Enjoy the night with your best friends.

group-adventure.label: Sports Activities
group-adventure.desc: Compete and have fun in sports activities.

honeymoon-luxury.label: Romantic Dinners
honeymoon-luxury.desc: Intimate moments with the finest cuisine.

honeymoon-luxury.label: Luxury Spa
honeymoon-luxury.desc: Relaxation and wellness at the highest level.

honeymoon-luxury.label: Private Tours
honeymoon-luxury.desc: Exclusive experiences for just the two of you.

paws-adventure.label: Pet-Friendly Parks
paws-adventure.desc: Spaces where your pet can run freely.

paws-adventure.label: Beach Activities
paws-adventure.desc: Enjoy sun and sand with your furry companion.

paws-adventure.label: Hiking Trails
paws-adventure.desc: Explore nature together on pet-friendly trails.

summary.importantNote1: Transport is required and does not add cost.
summary.importantNote2: Freemium: the first optional filter is free.
